Sample message 
As parents, hearing your little one coughing through the night can be scary. Protecting them from respiratory illnesses through vaccination can help keep them healthy. Talk to your child's doctor about how to lower your child's risk of flu and other respiratory viruses this season. https://bit.ly/49QZ4bX

Respiratory illnesses affect the lungs and airways. Get information on common causes, prevention actions, and current levels of illness in your community.
